summary: Tested VocoLens app - all backend APIs and frontend onboarding flow working correctly

issues: Subtitle text 'Turn your thoughts into clear insights' has low contrast (light purple on purple background)

critical_code_review_comments: In-memory usage_store resets on backend restart - by design per original Hono backend, but worth noting
Usage store has no MongoDB persistence - data lost on restart

success_rate.frontend: 100% - welcome screen loads, onboarding flow works

context_for_next_testing_agent: VocoLens Expo React Native web app. Backend FastAPI on /api routes. Frontend is pre-built static bundle served on port 3000. All core flows tested: welcome screen, Start Journaling Free button → theme selection (6 themes shown, Continue button visible). Backend APIs: /api/journal/status (openrouter connected), /api/sample/ (greetings), /api/usage/status (returns usage data), POST /api/usage/record (records seconds). No auth required.
